name: RSA SecurID Account Lockout
description: User’s account is locked after entering the wrong passcode multiple times in a row. This can be an indication of a brute-force or password spraying attack against a user's account.

prompts.prompt: The user `{user_name}` had their RSA SecurID account locked out at `{timestamp}`. Investigate the failed authentication attempts leading to the lockout, including the source IP address (`{source_address}`) and the number of failed attempts. Determine if this is a legitimate user error or a potential brute-force/password spraying attack. Provide a summary of your findings and recommend immediate actions, such as resetting the user's token or blocking the source IP.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The name of the user whose account was locked out.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The time the account lockout occurred.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the failed authentication attempts.
